---
title: "Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Project"
---

This was a team-based project where we used Python to analyze airline performance data from Buffalo Niagara International Airport in order to identify delay trends and potential operational inefficiencies. I supported the data preparation, model planning, and visualization development to help uncover patterns in airline scheduling performance.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Notebook (Main)
```{=html}
<iframe
  src="Buffalo%20Flights%20Data%20Analysis%20Folder/fligh_data.html"
  style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:0;">
</iframe>
```

## ReadMe

{{< include "Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Folder/README.md" >}}

## My Contributions

{{< include "Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Folder/RanXinJiang_Individual_Contributions.md" >}}

:::
